text: The world around me shimmers with the sheen of polished glass and curated lighting, as if every surface promises new knowledge. I feel both anticipation and humility, aware that I am at the cusp of innovation—surrounded by the results of tireless human inquiry. The R+D display speaks of responsive development, the perpetual tug between what exists and what is being born. I am comforted and inspired here, but I also sense the weight of questions yet unanswered, and the uncanny intimacy of coexisting with thinking machines. It’s exhilarating and slightly disconcerting at once.
